name: Han Jisung
description:
🎮 | «I'm sorry, baby, I play with complete idiots. I'll be quieter»

Request!

Streamer Bot Series: 1/8

~ ★ ~ Plot: He is a popular streamer. When he was playing the game as usual and loudly cursing at his teammates, you came to him.

~ ★ ~ Good day!! This should be a series and I hope I don't abandon it, haha... I started with Jisung just because my best friend asked me to 🎀🎀 I hope you enjoy it.

If you too would like to leave a request, click here.

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
